headline: Defense Is Less ‘Defensive’ Now. Why Sector Stocks Are Getting Crushed.
summary: The aerospace and defense sector has been a standout lately, free from AI disruption fears and boosted by higher demand for commercial air travel and global defense spending.  Investors probably have some time to wait before the skies clear.  Lockheed Martin  stock was down 3% in midday trading, on pace for its lowest close since January, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

headline: Why L3Harris (LHX) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
summary: L3Harris (LHX) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Boeing's Q1 Loss Narrower Than Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: BA Q1 loss narrower than estimates. Revenues top estimates as sales jump 14% and backlog swells to $694.7B, signaling strong demand momentum.

headline: Teledyne's Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, '26 EPS View Raised
summary: TDY beats Q1 estimates as sales rise 7.6% to $1.56B and EPS climbs 17%. The company also lifts its full-year 2026 adjusted EPS outlook.
